flashcards.definition: Largest internal organ; bile production, detoxification, protein synthesis, storage.
Stores and concentrates bile; releases into duodenum when stimulated by CCK.
Produces bicarbonate and digestive enzymes (amylase, lipase, proteases).
Breakdown product of hemoglobin; processed by the liver; excess → jaundice.
Produce saliva containing water, amylase (starch digestion), mucin, and lysozyme.
